name: SanaDeep
tagline: The AI-native HRMS built for Indian enterprise — with multi-country payroll from day one.
description: Nineteen modules, hundreds of AI-powered features, statutory coverage across India, UAE, UK, and US. One platform, one login, eight languages.
longDescription: Most enterprise HRMS companies treat multi-country as a roadmap. We treated it as the foundation. SanaDeep runs payroll across India (PF, ESI, Form 16), the UAE (WPS), the UK (P60), and the US (W-2) from a single platform — with Arabic right-to-left support built in.
forWhom: For CHROs, HR heads, and finance leaders at enterprises operating across India, the Gulf, the UK, or the US.

keyCapabilities.title: Full-stack HRMS
keyCapabilities.description: Core HR, payroll, time and leave, performance, talent, and L&D — all in one platform, sharing one data model.

keyCapabilities.title: AI woven in
keyCapabilities.description: Anomaly detection on payroll runs, an org designer that suggests restructuring, predictive compliance flags before filing deadlines.

keyCapabilities.title: Four-country payroll
keyCapabilities.description: India PF/ESI, UAE WPS, UK P60, US W-2 — natively handled, not bolted on. Eight languages including Arabic RTL.

keyCapabilities.title: Enterprise-grade integrations
keyCapabilities.description: Connects to your existing ERP, IDP, accounting, and expense stack via SAML, SCIM, and REST.

outcomes: HR teams reclaim weeks of quarter-end work per year
Compliance risk drops because errors are caught before filing
Global operations unify under a single source of truth
New-country expansion takes days, not quarters
